subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1914-04-30
subcodes.first_line: I am leaving tomorrow for Tiberias. I am leaving because you have persisted so much... In the Cause we must give up all pleasures and recreation for the sake of service
subcodes.subjects: @devotion; sacrifice; consecration in teaching the Cause, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @words vs deeds, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @service to others; to the Cause of God
